title: Garden Route Badgers Leapfrogged to top of the table
description: OUDTSHOORN NEWS - The Garden Route Badgers...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"OUDTSHOORN NEWS - The Garden Route Badgers has leapfrogged to the top of the table in the Cricket South Africa Division 2 Four-day competition following an impressive 9 wicket victory against the Eastern Cape Iianyathi at the REC Cricket Stadium in Oudtshoorn on Sunday 21 December.","html":"OUDTSHOORN NEWS - The Garden Route Badgers has leapfrogged to the top of the table in the Cricket South Africa Division 2 Four-day competition following an impressive 9 wicket victory against the Eastern Cape Iianyathi at the REC Cricket Stadium in Oudtshoorn on Sunday 21 December."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Yaseen Valli and his troops collect 24.28 bonus points and are now at 73.38 points as they reach the half-way stage of the pool stages with three outright victories in three matches."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Eastern Storm are second at 65.62 (after four matches) followed by the Knights at 65.62 points after three matches.","html":"The Eastern Storm are second at 65.62 (after four matches) followed by the Knights at 65.62 points after three matches."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Badgers, after winning the toss, reached 423 with the former SA U.19 opening batsman, Ruan Terblanche who contributed a career best 161 (from 290 balls; 2x6, 17x4). Terblanche and the skipper Yaseen Valli (41) contributed 109 runs for the first wicket.","html":"The Badgers, after winning the toss, reached 423 with the former SA U.19 opening batsman, Ruan Terblanche who contributed a career best 161 (from 290 balls; 2x6, 17x4). Terblanche and the skipper Yaseen Valli (41) contributed 109 runs for the first wicket."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"George van Heerden (67) continued his fine form whilst Zack Momberg (58) and Jade Richter set up a new Garden Route Badgers first class record partnership of 97 for the ninth wicket, breaking the record of Wessel Hartslief and Nathan Murray (89 vs Boland in the 2008/09 season).","html":"George van Heerden (67) continued his fine form whilst Zack Momberg (58) and Jade Richter set up a new Garden Route Badgers first class record partnership of 97 for the ninth wicket, breaking the record of Wessel Hartslief and Nathan Murray (89 vs Boland in the 2008/09 season)."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Iianyathi were dismissed for only 154 in their first innings with Jade Richter (4/51), Banele Cele (3/34) and Liam Alder (3/25) the bowling heroes for the home side.","html":"The Iianyathi were dismissed for only 154 in their first innings with Jade Richter (4/51), Banele Cele (3/34) and Liam Alder (3/25) the bowling heroes for the home side."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"With a deficit of 269 the Badgers have enforced the follow-on. The visitors from East London have produced a much improved batting performance when they responded with 308 (all out).","html":"With a deficit of 269 the Badgers have enforced the follow-on. The visitors from East London have produced a much improved batting performance when they responded with 308 (all out)."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Liam Alder, who bowled a marathon 48.2 overs, bagged 5/93. With a modest target, the Badgers finished the match at 40/1 to win by 9 wickets with two sessions to spare in the match.","html":"Liam Alder, who bowled a marathon 48.2 overs, bagged 5/93. With a modest target, the Badgers finished the match at 40/1 to win by 9 wickets with two sessions to spare in the match."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Although the Badgers will have a well earned holiday break they will return to action from 8-11 January when they take on the Northern Cape Heat in Kimberley.","html":"Although the Badgers will have a well earned holiday break they will return to action from 8-11 January when they take on the Northern Cape Heat in Kimberley."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The summarized score card is:","html":"The summarized score card is:"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Garden Route Badgers: 1st innings 423 (Ruan Terblanche 161, George van Heerden 67, Zack Momberg 58, Jade Richter 46, Yaseen Valli 41, Nico van Zyl 3/50, Hardus Coetzer 2/41, Kguadsi Molefi 2/37, Matthew Fourie 2/42) and 2nd innings 40/1 (Yaseen Valli 23*).","html":"Garden Route Badgers: 1st innings 423 (Ruan Terblanche 161, George van Heerden 67, Zack Momberg 58, Jade Richter 46, Yaseen Valli 41, Nico van Zyl 3/50, Hardus Coetzer 2/41, Kguadsi Molefi 2/37, Matthew Fourie 2/42) and 2nd innings 40/1 (Yaseen Valli 23*)."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Eastern Cape Iianyathi: 154 (Wian Ruthven 56, Matthew Fourie 44*, Jade Richter 4/51, Banele Cele 3/34, Liam Alder 3/26) and 2nd innings 308 (Nathan Roux 53, Lihle Sizani 50, Hardus Coetzer 54, Liam Alder 5/93) Garden Route Badgers won by 9 wickets.","html":"Eastern Cape Iianyathi: 154 (Wian Ruthven 56, Matthew Fourie 44*, Jade Richter 4/51, Banele Cele 3/34, Liam Alder 3/26) and 2nd innings 308 (Nathan Roux 53, Lihle Sizani 50, Hardus Coetzer 54, Liam Alder 5/93) Garden Route Badgers won by 9 wickets."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Garden Route Badgers Leapfrogged to top of the table
